title: The Toxic Workplace at ICICI LOMBARD - Exposed With HR Call  #icici

description:
👉 First I sent Recording proof  for  ICICI LOM.  Branch ( Kharagpur )manager (Chandra Sekhar Roy )  abuse recording to HR.

👉 I was promised that this will not happen again. But after a few days, the manager (Chandra Roy ) treated me again very badly. I said again to the HR.

👉 Even after I informed the Higher management , On the contrary, I was forced to work until late at night daily .
Generally working time is 9.00 am to 6.15 pm. But we were asked to do it on Sunday too.

👉 suddenly Surprised to see from my profile updates that my work location has been changed from Kharagpur to Berhampur .
And this whole thing happened without intimation to me & no official email has not been sent from HR team .
And  without my consent it has already been approved by my senior persons . 

👉 I was informed that there is no requirement for this post in Kharagpur location so I was sent to another place. After fighting for many days I resigned compulsorily.

👉 I wanted to work from Kharagpur branch. But you deliberately played politics with me and forced me to resign. 
Now another girl is working in my place, how?? 🤔

💥 So far I understand that , the company used to  support the bad behavior of the branch manager . It's a matter of great regret that , I'm not found any amicable decision  from Management .

💫 Last but not the least, ICICI LOMBARD  following the company's rules and norms without thinking about the  employee . 

#icici 
#icicilombard 
#job
#toxicworkplace
